system.notes:
Insulated Mastermind, Old Money

Ennui is a danger to the wealthy. Booker fills his days by gathering intelligence and planning heists, then selling the plans to ambitious gangs that lack his patience, experience, resources, and insight. Twice a month he goes to the opera, and meets those who have arranged to purchase a score.

Sometimes things go wrong, and it is natural to blame the planner and want revenge. Sometimes a target wants to punish those who acted against them, even if the act was planning.
